name: Day/Night Cycle
description: Time-of-day system with sun/moon rotation, ambient light color interpolation, and weather transition hooks. Supports configurable day length, sky colors, and ambient intensity ramping.

slots.name: parent
slots.description: Parent node path for the DayNightManager

slots.name: day_length_seconds
slots.description: Full day cycle length in seconds (real-time)

slots.name: start_time
slots.description: Starting time as fraction of day (0=midnight, 0.25=dawn, 0.5=noon, 0.75=dusk)

slots.name: ambient_min
slots.description: Minimum ambient light energy at midnight

slots.name: ambient_max
slots.description: Maximum ambient light energy at noon
